trans-unit.source: Path to PDF parsers: Specify the directory containing the "pdftotext" and "pdfinfo" applications used to extract content from PDF files. Leave empty if not available.

PDF Parsing Mode: Define how PDF files are split during indexing. "0" indexes the entire file at once. A positive value sets the number of pages per batch (e.g. "5" → pages 1–5, 6–10, …). A negative value sets the number of groups (e.g. "-3" → file split into 3 groups). Allowed range: -100 to 100.
Path to unzip: Specify the directory containing the "unzip" application used to extract content from OpenOffice.org/Oasis OpenDocument files. Leave empty if not available.
Path to WORD parser: Specify the directory containing the "catdoc" application used to extract content from MS WORD files. Leave empty if not available.
Path to EXCEL parser: Specify the directory containing the "xlhtml" application used to extract content from MS EXCEL files. Leave empty if not available.
Path to POWERPOINT parser: Specify the directory containing the "ppthtml" application used to extract content from MS POWERPOINT files. Leave empty if not available.
Path to RTF parser: Specify the directory containing the "unrtf" application used to extract content from RTF files. Leave empty if not available.
Full Text Data Length: Limit the amount of full-text data stored (in bytes). Lower values reduce database usage but also restrict sentence-level searching and the length of search result excerpts.
Disable Indexing in Frontend: Prevent pages from being indexed during frontend access. Indexing is then performed only by the backend page crawler.
Min TTL (hours) for Indexed Page: Set the minimum time (in hours) that must pass before an indexed page is eligible for re-indexing, regardless of page changes.
Max External Files to Index: Limit how many external files found on a page are indexed. This helps prevent excessive server load but may leave some documents unindexed.

Bitmask for Flags (Advanced): Define the weighting of HTML metadata during indexing (value range: 0–255). <title> = 128, <keywords> = 64, <description> = 32. Set to 0 to give these fields no additional weight. Default 192 prioritizes title and keywords in search results.
Ignore Extensions: Specify a comma-separated list of file extensions that the external parser should ignore, even if supported.
Index External HTML URLs: Enable indexing of external links when the target content type is "text/html"..
Enable MySQL specific fulltext search: After toggling this flag the database schema should be updated using System → Maintenance → Analyze Database Structure.
Remove content from index if page or its content is edited
